nasb.text: for he had possessions of flocks and herds and a great household, so that the Philistines envied him.

esv.text: He had possessions of flocks and herds and many servants, so that the Philistines envied him.

cnv.text: 他擁有羊群、牛群和很多僕人，非利士人就嫉妒他。

ccb.text: 他拥有很多的牛羊和仆婢，非利士人嫉妒他。

csbs.text: 他拥有羊群、牛群和许多仆婢，非利士人就嫉妒他。
